objective: Close GAP-004 by adding a first-class read-only session-context command that returns one narrow JSON packet for current issue, branch, commit, changed files, active artifacts, runtime-card artifacts, review artifacts, local session references, stale evidence, and next traversal hints.

linearSnapshot.scopeNote: Linear still describes Phase 1 while this goal governs the full lifecycle. This slice records Linear as planning ownership context only; it does not use Linear as runtime, implementation, CI, review, or closeout proof.

assumptions: The first GAP-004 implementation should be a read-only repo-local traversal packet, not a session database or Codex source integration.
The command may summarize local evidence paths and stale/missing diagnostics, but it must not claim remote PR, CI, review, or Linear freshness unless a separate current snapshot exists.
The existing session-context/v1 schema from PU-021 can be promoted from not_yet_emitted to emitted only if the command output and example satisfy the schema and parity validator.
Git branch, head SHA, and changed-file discovery may use local git commands through child_process because the command is read-only.
Runtime-card and review-artifact discovery must be bounded to repo-owned artifact directories and must avoid reading bulky raw logs or transcripts.
Path safety must use canonical realpath-style containment checks for existing files and directories so symlinks cannot escape --repo-root.

A top-level pass status is allowed only when required local orientation surfaces are current. Missing, stale, or unknown local evidence must downgrade the packet status to warn; bounds or usage failures may return fail or usage errors.
nonGoals: Do not create a public delivery-truth or closeout authority command.
Do not ingest or persist raw Codex transcripts, prompts, secrets, credentials, or bulky session telemetry.
Do not mutate /Users/jamiecraik/dev/codex or depend on Codex source branch cleanliness.
Do not refresh live GitHub, CI, CodeRabbit, or Linear state in this slice.
Do not make harness next --json depend on session-context in this slice.
Do not treat Project Brain, memory, or rollout-search references as claim support.
implementationApproach: Add a deep module under src/lib/session-context/ with typed contracts, local artifact discovery, stale/missing diagnostics, and a read-only collector.
Add src/commands/session-context.ts as a compatibility facade that exports the CLI runner and types.
Add a command registry seam for harness session-context with --json and optional --repo-root support.

Project local git branch, headSha, changed files, active artifact refs, runtime-card refs, review artifact refs, session evidence refs, Project Brain refs, and next traversal hints into session-context/v1.
Keep evidenceUse orientation-only unless a future slice binds a ref to a current receipt.
Update the session-context schema/example/manifest from not_yet_emitted to emitted with typeSource set to the new deep module.

Add regression tests for read-only behavior, missing/stale artifact diagnostics, command registry visibility, canonical symlink path bounds, status downgrade semantics, redacted session-evidence metadata, and schema/example parity.
validationGates: pnpm exec biome check src/lib/session-context src/commands/session-context.ts src/commands/session-context.test.ts src/lib/cli/registry/session-context-command-spec.ts contracts/session-context.schema.json contracts/runtime-packet-schemas.manifest.json contracts/examples/session-context.example.json scripts/validate-runtime-packet-schemas.cjs src/dev/validate-runtime-packet-schemas-script.test.ts .harness/intent/codex-runtime-evidence-verifier-cockpit-pu-022-gap-004-session-context-intent.json

git diff --check -- src/lib/session-context src/commands/session-context.ts src/commands/session-context.test.ts src/lib/cli/registry/session-context-command-spec.ts src/lib/cli/registry/command-specs-core.ts src/lib/cli/command-registry.test.ts src/lib/cli/registry/command-specs.test.ts contracts/session-context.schema.json contracts/runtime-packet-schemas.manifest.json contracts/examples/session-context.example.json scripts/validate-runtime-packet-schemas.cjs src/dev/validate-runtime-packet-schemas-script.test.ts docs/cli-reference.md .harness/intent/codex-runtime-evidence-verifier-cockpit-pu-022-gap-004-session-context-intent.json .harness/implementation-notes/codex-runtime-evidence-verifier-cockpit.mdx .harness/implementation-notes/implementation-notes.html docs/goals/codex-runtime-evidence-verifier-cockpit/state.yaml docs/goals/codex-runtime-evidence-verifier-cockpit/receipts.jsonl
reviewerPolicyNote: This slice uses the explicit goal-required independent reviewers for intent and done checks. Harness-first review remains required for implementation-sensitive source changes through the he-code-review skill lens and any project-local harness reviewer required by the final review scope.
riskControls: The command must not follow paths outside --repo-root and must use canonical containment checks for symlinked existing paths.

The command must not include file contents for review artifacts, session logs, runtime cards, or transcripts; only repo-relative refs, allow-listed basename/path metadata, size, freshness, and diagnostic status.

Session evidence discovery must be allow-listed to repo-owned locations such as .harness/runtime, artifacts/runtime, artifacts/reviews, and docs/goals receipts; it must not scan .codex/sessions, raw transcript stores, environment files, or arbitrary home-directory paths.
Top-level pass status must not be emitted when any required local traversal surface is stale, missing, or unknown.
Remote truth remains unknown unless a verifier-owned snapshot is present.
Any discovered stale/missing artifact must appear in staleState and must not become a pass claim.
The command must be listed in harness commands --json and must stay read-only under tests.
acceptanceCriteria: session-context command exits 0 and emits schemaVersion session-context/v1 for a valid repo.
JSON output includes issueRef, local branch/headSha, changed files, active route refs, runtime-card refs, review artifact refs, session evidence refs, stale state diagnostics, and traversal hints.
Missing runtime-card, session evidence, or review artifact directories classify as missing or unknown, not pass.
Schema/example/manifest parity passes with session-context marked emitted.
Command registry exposes session-context in harness commands --json.
Tests prove no write paths are used, unsafe repo-root traversal is rejected or bounded, symlink escapes are not followed, and stale/missing required local surfaces downgrade status to warn.
Receipt records Project Brain inputs, Linear snapshot freshness, GAP-004 adoption, skill-lens artifacts, and independent reviewer artifacts.
blockedConditions: Stop if implementation needs to read raw transcript bodies, prompt text, secrets, or credentials.
Stop if command output would be used as closeout or merge-readiness proof rather than orientation.
Stop if the command needs live GitHub/Linear/CodeRabbit refresh; that belongs to external-state or closeout slices.
Stop if path handling cannot be constrained to the provided repo root.
